## Root Cause Summary

PEM_Status bits are not cleared even after trying to zero them. The system is in idle.

Issue occurred while using BIOS: 032.D77 with latest Pcode rev22.1.30:

The data was presented to the Pcoder that will provide a debug patch to debug.

iccmax & pkg_pl1_csr bits are still 1 even after trying to zero them: 

As part of the debug, the pem_status_average is shown to be ~zero (<pem_threshold)

Regarding the Pkg_pl1_Csr :

1) The telemetry aggregator related to Pkg_pl1_Csr was shown not to increas

## Raw HSD Text

<!-- This section provides raw HSD data for agent enrichment (Stage 3b). -->
<!-- The Copilot agent extracts root cause, fix description, code refs, and diagrams. -->

### Description
PEM_Status bits are not cleared even after trying to zero them. The system is in idle.

Issue occurred while using BIOS: 032.D77 with latest Pcode rev22.1.30:

The data was presented to the Pcoder that will provide a debug patch to debug.

iccmax & pkg_pl1_csr bits are still 1 even after trying to zero them: 

As part of the debug, the pem_status_average is shown to be ~zero (<pem_threshold)

Regarding the Pkg_pl1_Csr :

1) The telemetry aggregator related to Pkg_pl1_Csr was shown not to increase (so no limitation is expected).

2) Not limitation confirmed since the ccp_rapl_limit_reasons =0 and the ccp_limits= 0xff

Regarding the iccmax flag:

pem_fet is < simple_limit

All dfc_metrics show no limitation expected:

++++22611801490 vwang
[CloneScript] PreSighting 13014803813 cloned to Sighting 22022180500
++++1363603043 dlevy1
Just received a patch to be tested: https://af01p-igk.devtools.intel.com/artifactory/pcode_lnl-igk-local/Debug_packages/CBB/production_… After clearing pm_status read the following debug variables: last_pem_status_clear_mask pem_status_reset_req_fastpath_counter pem_status_reset_req_fastpath_counter_per_reason

++++1363604373 aodler
 @Wang, Vidar ,  @Levy, David J please note that we just managed to close an update for PEM spec for PCode, documented in this ticket: 13014578352 - [CBB] PEM enhancement - changes regarding SW requests to clear PEM_STATUS Can you please check whether it is aligned with the expectation in your test?

++++1363605259 dlevy1 
Thx Anatoli, As part of the debug we were given a patch and we had to update the environment tools. It looks like the issue is not reproducible anymore after updating the environment (even after coming back to official IFWI 032D77). It was checked on 2 systems AN1703 and SC8013. Pls close the HSD Note: Anyway, we will follow-up the new PEM_status change expected in the upcoming Pcode. Supporting data: system AN1703 - BIOS: 032.D77 with Pcode rev22.1.30

 @Levy, David J ,  @Wang, Vidar  following the results, this ticket be closed ? Thank you.
